items.claim: Fatima Klein has a reach advantage in the kickboxing arsenal.
items.quote: Fat Team Mle with a bit of a leg up from range in the kickboxing arsenal.

items.claim: Tabitha Richie lacks the physicality to compete in the clinch.
items.quote: when they tie up, I don't think Richie's physicality is enough.

items.claim: Fatima Klein's five-inch height advantage provides a leverage benefit in the clinch.
items.quote: the leverages favoring Fatima in the clinch being five inches taller are going to be a factor, too.

items.claim: Tabitha Richie is not a top-tier fighter in the weight class.
items.quote: we know for sure Richie is not top tier.

items.claim: Chase Hooper has poor striking skills.
items.quote: I think Chase Hooper's striking is really bad.
I think Chase Hooper's durability is really bad.

items.claim: Chase Hooper lacks physically imposing grappling.
items.quote: he doesn't have physically imposing grappling.

items.claim: Chase Hooper may still be dealing with post-concussion symptoms from his fight three months ago.
items.quote: it was only three months ago against Lance Gibson. I feel like he could still be dealing with postconussion symptoms.

items.claim: Chase Hooper has been knocked out violently in his past two fights.
items.quote: He's been knocked out bad in the past two. Hernandez violently, Lance Gibson violently

items.claim: Mitch Ramirez has never been submitted as a professional.
items.quote: we've never seen Mitch Ramirez submitted before as a pro.

items.claim: Chase Hooper has a 32% takedown average.
items.quote: average takedowns per fight, 32% takedown average.

items.claim: Christian Leroy Duncan is a sharp shooter from range with excellent straight punches and body kicks.
items.quote: Leroy Duncan is a sharp shooter from range. He's got excellent straight punches, nasty body kicks
